topStories.title: Why A US-Iran Ceasefire Hasn't Restored Normalcy In Global Shipping
topStories.description: While delayed vessels have begun moving through the Gulf once again, the maritime community is far from returning to business as usual.

topStories.title: YouTube Premium gets pricier as subscription costs rise in the US – Here's how much you have to pay now
topStories.description: YouTube has raised Premium subscription prices in the US, increasing costs for individual and family plans. The move comes amid wider streaming price hikes, though the platform has denied reports of longer unskippable ads.

topStories.title: Artemis II Splashdown: Timeline Of Astronauts Return To Earth As Final Phase To Begin
topStories.description: The Artemis II mission began on April 1 with the launch of NASA's Space Launch System (SLS) rocket from Launch Pad 39B at Kennedy Space Center in Florida.

topStories.title: US federal court hears new case against Trump tariffs
topStories.description: The case is to overturn the temporary tariffs that Trump imposed after the Supreme Court struck down his earlier ones.

dailyNews.title: Can Iran negotiations lead to peace?
dailyNews.description: Redi Tlhabi speaks to former Iran and US diplomats on the hopes for negotiations to end the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: New tensions emerge before US-Iran war ceasefire talks in Pakistan
dailyNews.description: Iranian official says conditions still not met before talks, as Trump re-ups threat of renewed attacks.

dailyNews.title: No US Talks Without Lebanon Ceasefire, Asset Release: Iran Speaker
dailyNews.description: Ghalibaf made the announcement shortly after US Vice President JD Vance had boarded a plane to fly to Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: Firmly oppose the targeting of civilians and infrastructure in West Asia conflict, says Jaishankar
dailyNews.description: IOR Ministers in Mauritius, for conference overshadowed this year by the US-Israel war with Iran and peace talks

dailyNews.description: The mistake appeared in comments made last month by Dr Mehmet Oz, the administrator of the Centres for Medicare & Medicaid Services.

dailyNews.title: Israeli Airstrikes In Lebanon Kill 20, Threaten Iran And US Peace Talks
dailyNews.description: Mohammad Baqir Ghalibaf, who is expected to head the Iranian delegation in talks with US Vice President JD Vance, has made a ceasefire in Lebanon and release of Iran's blocked assets as a precondition...

dailyNews.description: Donald Trump has sought greater influence over Latin America, but in Peru's election, will a pro-Trump stance pay off?

dailyNews.title: Potholes and progress: Mamdani reflects on 100 days as New York’s mayor
dailyNews.description: Mamdani's first 100 days marked by childcare reforms, pothole fixes and polarising debates over affordability policies.

dailyNews.title: Inflation rises in US amid Iran war, Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: Government report shows gasoline going up by 21.2 percent in March as petrol remains above $4 per gallon despite truce.

dailyNews.title: Zohran Mamdani marks 100 days in New York City Mayor's office
dailyNews.description: Zohran Mamdani, a Democrat, has notched a few notable early wins, and has reached a detente - at least for now - with US President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
dailyNews.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan sets modest goal for US-Iran summit: A deal to keep talks going
dailyNews.description: US-Iran talks open in Islamabad with mediators focused on keeping dialogue alive amid deep divisions.

dailyNews.title: Was Trump ready to fire Tulsi Gabbard over Iran war testimony? Report claims Roger Stone intervened
dailyNews.description: Trump spoke with his cabinet members and asked he should replace Tulsi Gabbard. Trump was reportedly frustrated over Gabbard shielding one of her former employees who resigned over America's Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Canadian politician goes viral for using sprawling LGBT acronym critics compare to a Wi-Fi password
dailyNews.description: A Canadian politician's use of the lengthy acronym MMIWG2SLGBTQQIA+ during public remarks went viral, with social media users comparing it to a password.

dailyNews.title: Teens suspected of murdering congressional intern linked by DNA on shell casings, prosecutors say
dailyNews.description: DNA evidence allegedly links two teenagers to the fatal shooting of a University of Massachusetts student working as a congressional intern in D.C.

dailyNews.description: The president has proposed the arch, which would rise on a Washington roundabout across from the Lincoln Memorial, as a way to celebrate America’s 250th anniversary.

dailyNews.title: Potential Democratic 2028 Candidates Condemn Trump’s ‘War of Choice’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: At a convention in New York, several Democrats mulling presidential bids rallied around opposition to President Trump’s decision to attack Iran.

dailyNews.title: Burned Before, Democrats Abruptly Revive the Idea of Impeaching Trump
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress have assiduously avoided talk of a third impeachment of President Trump, concerned that it would distract from their midterm campaign message. That tide seems to have turned.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: New plans for Trump arch show it would dwarf Lincoln Memorial
dailyNews.description: Plans submitted by the Interior Department show the triumphal arch would be 250 feet tall, the tallest triumphal arch in the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump proposes painting executive office building white
dailyNews.description: The building sits across a driveway from the West Wing and was completed in 1888.

dailyNews.title: Vance says he is positive about Iran talks but Trump is still slamming Tehran
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance appears positive about talks with Iran in Pakistan, but President Trump remains frustrated about Tehran's control over the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Imtiaz Tyab report.

dailyNews.title: Farmers react to high gas prices as Trump's Iran war rages on
dailyNews.description: Farmers across America are grappling with soaring fuel prices as the war in Iran impacts energy costs. CBS News' Lana Zak reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Artemis II astronauts "modern-day pioneers" in live conversation
dailyNews.description: President Trump praised the crew of NASA's Artemis II mission in a brief chat late Monday, saying they had "inspired the entire world" after they looped around the moon in a record-breaking voyage.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
